quick_tip.farm_upgrade_stand_on_field: Stand on the farm field to upgrade.
quick_tip.shop_purchase_failed: Can't afford or out of stock.
quick_tip.sprinkler_place_no_stamina: Not enough stamina to place a sprinkler.
quick_tip.sprinkler_place_success: Sprinkler placed: watered neighbors now and every morning.
quick_tip.sprinkler_place_not_tilled: Tile must be tilled and empty (no crop) before placing sprinkler.
quick_tip.sprinkler_place_has_crop: Tile already has a crop. Choose an empty plot.
quick_tip.fertilizer_apply_success: Fertilized: next crop on this tile matures 1 day faster (min 2 days).
quick_tip.fertilizer_apply_needs_empty_tilled: Fertilize only empty tilled tiles (no crop, no sprinkler).
quick_tip.plant_wrong_season: This crop cannot be planted in the current season.
